rules.name: Customer Exists
rules.description: Verify customer is registered in master data

rules.name: SKU Exists
rules.description: All line item SKUs must exist in product catalog
rules.suggestion: Possible match: SKU-45391 (Maggi Noodles 12pk - Regional variant). OCR may have misread last digit.

rules.name: Price Valid
rules.description: Unit prices within approved price list tolerance (±5%)

rules.name: Duplicate PO
rules.description: Check for duplicate PO number in last 90 days

rules.name: Delivery Date
rules.description: Delivery date must be a business day and within lead time
rules.suggestion: July 25, 2026 falls on a company holiday (Summer shutdown). Expected delivery: July 28, 2026.

rules.name: Tax Match
rules.description: Tax amount matches calculated rate for ship-to region

rules.name: Grand Total Match
rules.description: Grand total equals sum of line items plus tax
